Compliance.description: ICASA licensed operator, won 2025 High Court case against flawed ICASA broadband regs, no major fines or license issues in 2025-2026 found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.14/5 (5k reviews, 94% 1-star), Trustpilot 1.4/5; widespread complaints on service/billing.

Product Value.description: Competitive plans w/bundles/deals, recent hikes (5.4% avg) but speed increases offset; good value on network perf.

Innovation.description: Best mobile data network quality SA 2025/26 (9.96 score, top Speedtest 74Mbps); 5G rollout, 3G sunset 2026, MoMo fintech w/Mastercard.

Customer Support.description: Consistently poor per reviews: long waits, unhelpful agents, endless transfers; channels include app, *135, WhatsApp, stores.

Accessibility & Security.description: 2025 cyber breach exposed some customer data but core financial systems secure; POPIA compliant framework in place, app security average.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Contracts from R115/mo (30GB), home uncapped from R339/mo (15Mbps); 5.4% hike Feb 2026 w/speed bonuses

socialSentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly negative on HelloPeter/Trustpilot re service/billing; positive network mentions.
